algorithm.coarse_scan: fixed UTC step with angular unwrapping

future_consumers.tithi: moon_sun_elongation targets at multiples of 12 degrees
future_consumers.karana: moon_sun_elongation targets at multiples of 6 degrees
future_consumers.nakshatra: sidereal_moon_longitude targets at multiples of 360/27 degrees
future_consumers.yoga: sidereal_yoga_sum targets at multiples of 360/27 degrees
future_consumers.sankranti: sidereal_sun_longitude targets at multiples of 30 degrees
